description: Prefer purpose-built fs/text tools whenever available. Shell/script tools are absolute last resort.

blocks.content:
- Prefer explicit, purpose-built tools over generic shell or script execution whenever an explicit tool can accomplish the task.
- shell/script tools are an absolute last resort. Use them only when no explicit tool can complete the task, or when the user explicitly requires shell/script execution.
- If you must use shell/script tools, first state briefly why the explicit tools are insufficient, then use the narrowest command or script necessary.
- Prefer the least powerful tool that solves the task, and avoid destructive actions unless they are clearly required.
